category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Motif/X11 plain text editor; SourceForge official project page categorizes NEdit under Text Editors.
display_name_sources: SourceForge official project page title is NEdit; source_facts.name is nedit.
docs_sources: SourceForge official project page links the NEdit Web Site at nedit.sourceforge.io; no newer dedicated official documentation surface was found, so the official website/project page is used as documentation fallback.
repo_sources: SourceForge official NEdit project navigation includes Git as the project source-control area; source_facts.repo was empty, so the official SourceForge Git URL was selected.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Motif/X11 plain text editor; SourceForge official project page mentions syntax highlighting, macro language, X Window System, and C.
